examples: I don't think jaywalking is allowed.
There were no cars to stop for but jaywalking is heavily frowned upon here.
Reckless driving, drunk driving and jaywalking, for instance, account for a high percentage of deaths and accidents.
He claimed the boy was jaywalking and when stopped, started "yelling and making a scene" and "fighting" when the patrolmen tried to frisk him.
Clearly the judge saw the absurdity of convicting a mother who had just lost her 4-year-old to a hit-and-run death, whose only crime was jaywalking.
